title: Build a GraphQL API
input_format: GraphQL queries and mutations as strings with optional variables
output_format: JSON response with data field and optional errors array
example_input: query { user(id: "1") { name email posts { title } } }
constraints: Must handle nested queries up to 5 levels deep. Must prevent N+1 queries with DataLoader. Must support queries, mutations, and input validation.
function_signature: class GraphQLServer { schema: GraphQLSchema; resolvers: Resolvers; execute(query: string, variables?: Record<string, any>): Promise<ExecutionResult>; }
